_comment: Per-fixture worst-page tolerances for the generated IDML/PDF corpus.
Each fixture's renderer-vs-pdftoppm output is gated on these numbers in
Semantics: a fixture passes iff *every* page that has a matching
mean_de <= max_mean_de AND p99_de <= max_p99_de AND ssim >= min_ssim.
Pages without a matching reference are skipped (max_pages_with_pdf bounds
this — IDMLs that grew past their last InDesign-export are still allowed
to run; only the first N pages are gated).
Calibration: thresholds were chosen by running the harness once
against the renderer at commit ade9b0b (first commit on this branch)
and adding ~15-25% headroom over the worst observed page so noise
does not flap. Treat these as 'the gate that passes today' — the
real long-term goal is the idea.md §13.2 budgets:
mean ΔE <= 1.0, p99 ΔE <= 2.5, SSIM >= 0.99 (every page).
Tighten these whenever the renderer beats them by a comfortable
margin; loosening them needs a written rationale in the commit msg.

fixtures.name: geometry
fixtures.rationale: worst page meanΔE 0.108, p99 0.000, SSIM 0.994 → headroom ~40% on mean to absorb pdftoppm/lcms2 jitter; pages are mostly white so p99 is structurally ~0.

fixtures.name: geometry-groups
fixtures.rationale: page 6 nested-group case is the outlier (mean 0.97 / p99 47.3 / SSIM 0.982). Threshold sized to it + ~20%; tighten after Tier 3 #15 (overprint) lands.

fixtures.name: strokes-fills
fixtures.rationale: worst page meanΔE 0.440 (p12), p99 9.381 (p18), SSIM 0.987 (p13) → +15-25% headroom. Stroke gradient endpoint regressions tend to spike p99 first; budget catches >20% drift.

fixtures.name: text
fixtures.rationale: worst page meanΔE 0.534 (p6), p99 8.771 (p6), SSIM 0.973 → +20% mean / +20% p99 / -0.3 SSIM headroom. Body text drift is usually metric/leading; this catches a per-line shift > ~1px.

fixtures.name: text-advanced
fixtures.rationale: worst page meanΔE 0.562 / p99 15.963 / SSIM 0.968 (p1, drop-cap + tabs). +20% headroom. Drop-cap glyph-clip and tab decimal alignment are the touchy paths here.

fixtures.name: effects
fixtures.rationale: worst page meanΔE 0.334 / p99 5.349 / SSIM 0.993 (p12, feathers). +25% mean / +20% p99 headroom. Feather + drop-shadow pages dominate; SSIM stays high because pixels are spread across a smooth gradient.

fixtures.name: gradients
fixtures.rationale: fully passing today (worst meanΔE 0.158 / p99 1.027 / SSIM 0.994). Tightest of the corpus — keeps CMYK gradient tessellation fidelity (commit 86b5bdf) honest.

fixtures.name: tables
fixtures.rationale: worst page meanΔE 0.886 / p99 10.827 / SSIM 0.967 (p3). Tables are the loosest fixture — IDML ships 8 pages but the reference PDF has 7, so we cap at 7 pages and skip the trailing one.

fixtures.name: images
fixtures.rationale: IDML ships 14 pages but reference PDF only covers the first 5 (the IDML has grown past its last InDesign export). The 5 gated pages have meanΔE ≤ 0.104 / p99 0 / SSIM ≥ 0.995; tight bounds reflect that.
